meta.title: Qafila — the letter of credit, without the bank

hero.title: The letter of credit, without the bank.
hero.subtitle: Lock stablecoin in escrow on Polygon. Your overseas supplier is paid the moment shipment is proven — no bank, no 7–10-day wait.

how.title: How it works
how.step1Body: The importer locks stablecoin in a smart-contract escrow — held in trust (amana), not sent.
how.step2Body: The exporter submits the agreed shipping document. Its hash is checked on-chain.
how.step3Body: On proof, the escrow releases funds to the exporter automatically. The light passes.
